blended.narrative: Bromley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
